abilities.name: Big Bomb
abilities.text:
Create a Big Bomb token anywhere within 6" of Gnorc Big Bomber.

If Gnorc Big Bomber currently has a Big Bomb on the board, they can't create a second one until their first Big Bomb explodes.

abilities.name: Big Bomb (Token Rules)
abilities.text:
A Big Bomb is treated as a [[kw:small-obstacle|Small Obstacle]] for all rules purposes. At the start of each of your turns, roll a d6: on a 5+, the Big Bomb explodes.

Any monster within base contact of the Big Bomb can attempt to kick it by spending an Action Token. If they do so, roll a d6: on a 1-4, move the Big Bomb up to 2x that many inches in any direction (or 2x + 2" if they're a Medium or larger monster). On a 5+, the Big Bomb explodes.

If the Big Bomb is targeted by an ability that allows a monster to move it, roll a d6: on a 5+, the Big Bomb explodes before they do so.

When the Big Bomb explodes, roll a d20: all monsters within 3" take that much damage. All monsters within 6" take that much damage, to a maximum of 6.
